---
title: "Cornelia Sarah Keble"
---

## Cornelia Sarah Keble

**Dates:** (1828-23 Dec 1858)

**Maiden name:** (Cornish)

### Description

first wife of Keble’s nephew

### Biography

She married (1851) the Rev. Thomas Keble, jr.  She was known as ‘Keenie’ [<i>Dulce Domum</i>]

### Letters

- Letter from February 16, 1859

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
